message:
test: reduce fuzz regression corpus test iterations for faster CI

Reduce schedule_permutation_fuzz_regression_corpus_artifact test parameters:
- iterations: 24 -> 4
- max_steps: 10000 -> 256

The test's purpose is to verify the regression corpus pipeline (trace
fingerprinting, minimization, deterministic sorting, artifact serialization),
not to fuzz broadly. Four iterations with 256 max steps are sufficient to
exercise all corpus-generation paths while keeping CI wall time low.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
